name: 💳 Credit360 Credit Repair Services 📈
description_short: Miami-based credit repair company that disputes negative items on credit reports and charges fees only after successful deletions, with a 100% money-back guarantee.
description_long:
Credit360 Credit Repair is a financial services firm based in Miami that specializes in personal credit restoration and business credit solutions. The company was established to help individuals repair damaged credit profiles and assist businesses in building stronger financial portfolios. According to their website, they claim to have helped thousands of families and businesses through their guided strategies.

Credit360 offers a comprehensive credit repair program called "360 Repair, Rebuild, and Relax" that includes full credit audits across all three bureaus (Equifax, TransUnion, Experian), unlimited disputes of credit items over a one-year period, and comprehensive credit audits every 45 days. Clients receive 24/7 online portal access, free credit coaching and education, assistance with line of credit structuring, and guidance on card spending and tradeline building. The company also provides business credit services and general credit education through their Credit 101 program.

Credit360's primary differentiation is their "pay-after-deletion" pricing model, where clients allegedly only pay fees once items are successfully removed or repaired from credit reports. This contrasts with traditional monthly-fee credit repair companies. The company emphasizes confidence in their "advanced disputing tactics" and backs their service with a 100% money-back guarantee and no-hassle cancellation policy. They also advertise same-day service and one-on-one customer service availability.

As a credit repair company, Credit360 operates in a heavily regulated industry with significant FTC oversight. While their pay-after-deletion model is legally permissible, consumers should understand that credit repair outcomes depend on the accuracy of reported information and creditor responsiveness to disputes—factors beyond the company's control. The website makes confident claims about results but provides no specific success rates, case studies, or independent verification of outcomes. Prospective clients should carefully review the service agreement and understand exactly what constitutes a "deletion" before engaging.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Pay-after-deletion pricing model means clients don't pay upfront fees before seeing results
100% money-back guarantee backs their confidence in dispute outcomes
Unlimited credit item disputes included for one year rather than limited dispute counts
Comprehensive credit audits every 45 days keeps clients informed of progress
No monthly fees structure makes the service more affordable than traditional monthly-fee competitors
24/7 online portal access allows clients to monitor their case from any device
Free credit coaching and education included as part of service, not sold separately
cons: No published success rates, case studies, or independent verification of deletion claims on website
Vague definition of what qualifies for 'deletion' or 'repair'—unclear which negative items can actually be removed versus disputed
Credit repair outcomes ultimately depend on creditors and bureaus responding to disputes, which the company cannot control
Company location limited to Miami despite national phone number, potentially limiting local support availability
Website makes confident claims about 'advanced disputing tactics' but provides no explanation of specific methodology or strategy differences from competitors
best_for: Consumers with multiple negative items on credit reports who want to avoid paying monthly retainer fees
Individuals willing to wait 45-90 days for audit cycles and dispute resolution processes
Business owners seeking to build or repair both personal and business credit profiles simultaneously
People skeptical of traditional credit repair companies who want proof of deletions before paying
diagnosis: Credit360 is best suited for consumers with negative credit report items who distrust traditional monthly-fee credit repair models and want to see results before paying. The main caveat is that credit repair success depends on whether reported items are actually inaccurate—legitimate negative information cannot be legally removed, only disputed—and the company provides no evidence of success rates or specific results on their website.
services: Full credit audit across Equifax, TransUnion, and Experian
Unlimited credit item disputes for one year
Personal credit repair and profile optimization
Free credit coaching and financial education
Assistance with credit line structuring and tradeline building
24/7 online portal access for case monitoring
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 5825 SW 68th St Suite 101, South Miami, FL 33143
